description_for_human: Nrth AI builds the Nrth Agentic OS — a secure, on-premise AI runtime for enterprise agents — and ships paid early-access deployments.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to (1) read about the Nrth Agentic OS — a secure, on-premise AI runtime that connects enterprise workflows, AI models, agents, and skills into one accountable layer — and Nrth AI's early-access services, (2) submit a discovery brief on behalf of a prospective client, (3) book a 30-minute consultation, or (4) chat with the live Nrth AI sales agent. Nrth AI is a pre-seed AI product startup based in Bergen, Norway. The plugin exposes structured endpoints; agents should prefer these over scraping the HTML. Always confirm any submitted contact details with the user before calling submitInquiry or bookConsultation.
